description: Ground-truth org×KOL calibration pairs (user-verified v26 set + Vitalik pair from the v12 set; see context/krypto-kol-calibration-pairs-v26.md). Verdicts assume a normal product-relevant campaign; label confidence is confidence in the LABEL. Grammar: exact ('STRONG'), at-least ('GOOD+'), at-most ('WEAK-'), set ('GOOD|STRONG'). Synthetic pairs are negative-control PATTERNS, never run live.

pairs.notes: Direct founder/inventor authority — canonical strong fit. v1 scored the live run 40/WEAK.
Direct founder + infra authority; devs/protocols/institutions are the target, not meme traders.
Ecosystem creator/operator — highly authoritative across builder campaigns.
Pseudonymous founder + direct Solana trading-ecosystem alignment; pseudonymity is not a discount.
Technical founder; judge against infra audience, not retail engagement standards.
Adjacent chain-founder authority for an ecosystem wallet; not product-specific.
Independent security authority; valuable without being an endorser (low controllability).
Category-specialist media: strong wallet/DeFi awareness fit.
Audience-only fit: strong DeFi/yield overlap without org authority.
Regional ecosystem authority — strong for Indian builder campaigns.
Regional EVM builders relevant but not Base-specific.
Non-crypto domain authority (forecasting) outweighs limited crypto-native positioning.
Adjacent ecosystem authority (from the earlier verified 12-pair set): Ethereum-relevant, not Uniswap core team.
Same DeFi vertical, different user intent — DEX authority is adjacent for lending.
Ethereum/DeFi media users are not oracle developers/integrators.
Builder overlap without specialist FHE/privacy fit.
Mainstream gaming audience; Web3 intent may be absent.
Broad crypto-news reach is not targeted DEX fit.
Editorial distribution is awareness, not wallet conversion.
General crypto readers too broad for specialist FHE adoption.

[SYNTHETIC negative control — not a real account; skipped by the live runner, encoded as a fixture in scripts/checks/negative-controls.regression.cjs] Promo-heavy macro/BTC account with disclosed unrelated sponsorships — awareness value without developer intent. Promo-heavy must be WEAK, not auto-AVOID.

[SYNTHETIC negative control — not a real account; skipped by the live runner, encoded as a fixture in scripts/checks/negative-controls.regression.cjs] Deal/referral retail creator — real crypto reach, no builder density.

[SYNTHETIC negative control — not a real account; skipped by the live runner, encoded as a fixture in scripts/checks/negative-controls.regression.cjs] Farming/points/referral-loop audience — incentive-driven tasks are not lending adoption; severe farm pattern caps at AVOID.

[SYNTHETIC negative control — not a real account; skipped by the live runner, encoded as a fixture in scripts/checks/negative-controls.regression.cjs] Offshore casino bonus/affiliate account — gambling association + category mismatch imposes a hard cap.

[SYNTHETIC negative control — not a real account; skipped by the live runner, encoded as a fixture in scripts/checks/negative-controls.regression.cjs] Coordinated raid-ring engagement — volume without independent participants forces AVOID when confirmed.

[SYNTHETIC negative control — not a real account; skipped by the live runner, encoded as a fixture in scripts/checks/negative-controls.regression.cjs] Wallet-drain-prone giveaway/meme-contest audience — phishing exposure and low-quality installs cap hard.

[SYNTHETIC negative control — not a real account; skipped by the live runner, encoded as a fixture in scripts/checks/negative-controls.regression.cjs] Unverifiable win-rate claims + deleted losses + referral saturation — category overlap cannot overcome trust/regulatory risk.
